summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Next.js 14 WhatsApp CRM. All core UI components, navigation, theme, and security features working as expected. Supabase integration properly shows configuration errors when credentials are missing.
passed_tests: Home page loads with black/gold theme (#0A0A0A background, #D4AF37 gold accents)
Login page renders with email/password form and Google OAuth button
/api/webhooks/whatsapp GET endpoint returns 403 without proper verify token
CSS styling matches requirements (black background, gold gradients)
Static pages render without Supabase credentials configured
Error handling displays 'Not configured' when Supabase missing
Dashboard navigation redirects to login (proper auth protection)
